---
title: Species Overview
subtitle: SpringBloom2021 - Genome-resolved Metaproteomic Dataset
date: 09.04.2025
author: Cyrill Hofer
output:
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    highlight: tango
    self_contained: true
    code_folding: hide
    thumbnails: true
    gallery: false
    fig_width: 15
    df_print: kable
    fig_caption: yes
    use_bookdown: true
    css: custom.css
---

# Data Preparation
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, paged.print=FALSE}
# Clear R's Brain
rm(list = ls())

# Set the working directory
setwd("/SynologyDrive/PhD/Projects/SpringBloom2021/Method_Paper_Analysis/FinalAnalysis/Figure_02/SpeciesOverview/")

# Load the libraries
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(DT)
library(plotly)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggridges)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)   
library(ggh4x)
library(lubridate)
library(ggforce)

# Load the color palette
source("ColorPalette.R")

#─── 0) Read in your data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
dat_time <- read_csv("SpeciesOverview_PerDate.csv")
dat <- read_csv("../../../../Data/Species_Data/Final_Data/Species_Table.csv")

# force phylum specific color
# figure out the phylum‐order you actually want:
phylum_levels <- dat_time %>%
  count(Phylum) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  pull(Phylum) %>%
  as.character()

# if your ColorPalette is currently an unnamed vector of the right length,
#    give it those names:
if (length(ColorPalette) == length(phylum_levels) && is.null(names(ColorPalette))) {
  names(ColorPalette) <- phylum_levels
}

# now force your data to use that factor:
dat <- dat %>% mutate(Phylum = factor(Phylum, levels = phylum_levels)) %>%
  select(-c("Date", "Species_Abundance", "Total_Species_Abundance_Per_Date", "Relative_Species_Abundance_Per_Date")) %>%
  distinct()
```

```{r}
#─── 1) Build %-abundance dataframe ─────────────────────────────────────────
phylum_pct_df <- dat_time %>%
  group_by(Date, Phylum) %>%
  summarize(total_abund = sum(Species_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(pct_abund = total_abund / sum(total_abund, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

#─── 2) Determine phylum order by peak %-abundance ────────────────────────────
phylum_order <- phylum_pct_df %>%
  group_by(Phylum) %>%
  summarize(max_p = max(pct_abund), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(max_p)) %>%
  pull(Phylum)

#─── 3) Compute per‐phylum min & max for custom y‐scales ───────────────────────
phylum_limits <- phylum_pct_df %>%
  group_by(Phylum) %>%
  summarize(min_p = min(pct_abund), max_p = max(pct_abund),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(match(Phylum, phylum_order))

#─── 4) Build named list of y‐scales WITH TICKS & LABELS ON THE LEFT ─────────
y_scales <- phylum_limits %>%
  mutate(
    scale = map2(min_p, max_p, ~{
      dec <- ifelse(.y > 0.10, 0, 2)
      br  <- c(.x, .y)
      lbl <- function(x) paste0(sprintf(paste0("%.", dec, "f"), x*100), "%")
      scale_y_continuous(
        breaks   = br,
        labels   = lbl,
        expand   = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.05)),
        position = "left"
      )
    })
  ) %>%
  { set_names(.$scale, .$Phylum) }

#─── 5) Build facet labels “Phylum (n species)” ───────────────────────────────
facet_labels <- dat_time %>%
  group_by(Phylum) %>%
  summarize(n = n_distinct(Species_ID), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(match(Phylum, phylum_order)) %>%
  { set_names(paste0(.$Phylum, " (", .$n, ")"), .$Phylum) }

#─── 6) Compute “02” of each month for x‐axis breaks ──────────────────────────
start_month <- floor_date(min(dat_time$Date), "month") + days(1)
end_month   <- floor_date(max(dat_time$Date), "month") + days(1)
month_breaks <- seq(start_month, end_month, by = "1 month")

#─── Panel 1: %-abundance over time ──────────────────────────────────────────
p1 <- ggplot(
    phylum_pct_df %>% mutate(Phylum = factor(Phylum, levels = phylum_order)),
    aes(x = Date, y = pct_abund, fill = Phylum)
  ) +
  geom_area(color = "black", size = 0.2) +
  geom_point(size = 0.6, shape = 16, color = "black") +
  facet_wrap2(~Phylum, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y",
              strip.position = "left",
              labeller = labeller(Phylum = facet_labels)) +
  facetted_pos_scales(y = y_scales) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ColorPalette, guide = "none") +
  scale_x_date(limits      = c(min(dat_time$Date), max(dat_time$Date)),
               breaks      = month_breaks,
               date_labels = "%d %b",
               expand      = expansion(add = 0)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    # strip labels off in p1
    strip.text.y.left = element_blank(),
    strip.background  = element_blank(),
    strip.placement   = "outside",

    # no titles or legend
    axis.title      = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title      = element_blank(),

    # x‐axis labels
    axis.text.x     = element_text(size = 14, angle = 45, hjust = 1),

    # show y labels (percentages) on left
    axis.text.y     = element_text(size = 8, margin = margin(l = 6)),
    axis.ticks.y    = element_line(),

    # grids, spacing, margins
    panel.grid.major.x  = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x  = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.y     = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    plot.margin         = unit(c(1,0.5,1,1), "lines")
  )

#─── Middle: phylum names/counts ───────────────────────────────────────────────
label_df <- tibble(
  Phylum = names(facet_labels),
  label  = unname(facet_labels)
) %>%
  # reverse the ordering here
  mutate(Phylum = factor(Phylum, levels = rev(phylum_order)))

label_plot <- ggplot(label_df, aes(x = 1, y = Phylum, label = label)) +
  geom_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  # and reverse the scale here
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(phylum_order)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(1, 0, 1, 0), "lines"))

#─── Panel 2: genome‐size boxplots ────────────────────────────────────────────
p2 <- ggplot(
    dat %>% mutate(Phylum = factor(Phylum, levels = phylum_order)),
    aes(x = Estimated_Genome_Size, y = Phylum, fill = Phylum)
  ) +
   geom_jitter(shape = 21, color = "black",
              width = 0, height = 0.3, size = 1.8, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "black", outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.8, alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2.1e6, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 8.2e6),
                     breaks = seq(0, 8e6, by = 2e6),
                     labels = function(x) paste0(x/1e6, " Mbp"),
                     expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(phylum_order),
                   position = "right",
                   expand = expansion(add = 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ColorPalette, guide = "none") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    # remove y labels & ticks in p2
    axis.text.y     = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y    = element_blank(),

    # remove titles/strips
    axis.title      = element_blank(),
    strip.text      = element_blank(),
    plot.title      = element_blank(),

    # x‐axis labels
    axis.text.x     = element_text(size = 14, angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 2.5),

    # clean up & spacing
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.y     = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    plot.margin         = unit(c(1,0.5,1,1), "lines")
  )

#─── Combine and render ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
combined <- p1 + label_plot + p2 +
  plot_layout(ncol = 3, widths = c(3,2,3))

print(combined)

ggsave(
  "Plot_SpeciesAndGenomeSizeOverview.pdf",
  combined,
  height  = 10.27,
  width = 8.27,
  units  = "in",
  device = pdf
)

```
```{r}
Big_Actinos <- dat %>%
  filter(Phylum == "Actinomycetota" & Estimated_Genome_Size > 2100000)

Small_Bacteroidota <- dat %>%
  filter(Phylum == "Bacteroidota" & Estimated_Genome_Size <= 2100000)

Small_Pseudomonatoda <- dat %>%
  filter(Phylum == "Pseudomonadota" & Estimated_Genome_Size <= 2100000)
```



```{r}
# ── Small vs Big genomes: presentation-ready area plot ─────────────────────────
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# 1) Threshold & size class mapping
genome_thresh <- 2.1e6

size_key <- dat %>%
  select(Species_ID, Estimated_Genome_Size) %>%
  mutate(
    SizeClass = case_when(
      is.na(Estimated_Genome_Size) ~ NA_character_,
      Estimated_Genome_Size <= genome_thresh ~ "Small (≤2.1 Mbp)",
      TRUE ~ "Big (>2.1 Mbp)"
    )
  )

# 2) Aggregate to relative contribution per date
contrib_time <- dat_time %>%
  select(Date, Species_ID, Species_Abundance) %>%
  left_join(size_key, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(SizeClass)) %>%
  group_by(Date, SizeClass) %>%
  summarise(Total_Abund = sum(Species_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Relative = Total_Abund / sum(Total_Abund, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Ensure ordering: Big on bottom, Small on top
contrib_time <- contrib_time %>%
  mutate(SizeClass = factor(SizeClass, levels = c("Big (>2.1 Mbp)", "Small (≤2.1 Mbp)")))

# 3) Palette
SizePalette <- c(
  "Small (≤2.1 Mbp)" = "#4281A4",  # deep lake blue
  "Big (>2.1 Mbp)"   = "#EAD2AC"   # warm contrast
)

# 4) Plot
p_size_area <- ggplot(contrib_time, aes(x = Date, y = Relative, fill = SizeClass)) +
  geom_area(color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = SizePalette, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0, 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = month_breaks,
    date_labels = "%d %b",
    expand = expansion(add = 0)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Relative contribution of small vs. big genomes over time",
    x = NULL, y = "Relative abundance"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", margin = margin(b = 6)),
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(linewidth = 0.3),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 14, 10, 10)
  )

# 5) Export as PDF
ggsave("Plot_SmallVsBig_RelativeContribution_Area.pdf",
       p_size_area, width = 20, height = 10, units = "in", device = pdf)

# Print to viewer
print(p_size_area)

```

```{r}
# Filter only the selected phyla
top_genera <- dat %>%
  filter(Phylum %in% c("Actinomycetota", "Bacteroidota", "Pseudomonadota")) %>%
  
  # Count number of species per genus within each phylum
  group_by(Phylum, Genus) %>%
  summarise(Nr_Species = n_distinct(Species_ID), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  
  # Rank and take top 3 genera per phylum
  arrange(Phylum, desc(Nr_Species)) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = Nr_Species, n = 3, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

top_genera
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

# Step 1: merge taxonomy and abundance tables
merged_dat <- dat_time %>%
  left_join(dat %>% select(Species_ID, Phylum, Genus),
            by = c("Species_ID","Phylum"))

# Step 2: filter phyla of interest
filtered_dat <- merged_dat %>%
  filter(Phylum %in% c("Actinomycetota", "Bacteroidota", "Pseudomonadota"))

# Step 3: compute total abundance per genus (summing across species and time)
genus_abundance <- filtered_dat %>%
  group_by(Phylum, Genus) %>%
  summarise(
    Nr_Species = n_distinct(Species_ID),
    Total_Abundance = sum(Species_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop_last"
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Step 4: calculate overall and per-phylum relative abundance
genus_abundance <- genus_abundance %>%
  group_by(Phylum) %>%
  mutate(
    Phylum_Total = sum(Total_Abundance),
    Perc_of_Phylum = 100 * Total_Abundance / Phylum_Total
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    Perc_of_Community = 100 * Total_Abundance / sum(Total_Abundance)
  )

# Step 5: take top 3 most abundant genera per phylum
top3_abundant_genera <- genus_abundance %>%
  group_by(Phylum) %>%
  arrange(desc(Total_Abundance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 3) %>%
  ungroup()

top3_abundant_genera

```
